# Carlos Posada — Cloud & DevOps Engineer

> Carlos Posada is a Cloud & DevOps Engineer based in Medellín, Colombia, specializing in AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, QA Automation, and AI-powered infrastructure solutions. Available for hire.

## About

Carlos Posada architects high-velocity deployment pipelines and resilient cloud ecosystems. He specializes in Infrastructure as Code, automated quality gates, and AI-driven operations. Currently open to new opportunities.

- Location: Medellín, Colombia (COT, UTC-5)
- Email: hello@carlosposada.dev
- Website: https://carlosposada.dev

## Services

- [DevOps & Cloud Engineering](/services#devops-cloud): CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab), Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation), Kubernetes cluster management, DevSecOps & security hardening.
- [QA Automation](/services#qa-automation): Playwright & Cypress frameworks, API testing (RestAssured, Postman), performance & load testing (k6), visual regression testing.
- [AI-powered Solutions](/services#ai-solutions): Custom LLM implementation, AIOps for anomaly detection, RAG pipeline architecture, MLOps training workflows.

## Skills

AWS, GCP, Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker, GitHub Actions, Playwright, Python, LLM / AI, Selenium, Jenkins, TypeScript, Go, PyTorch, LangChain.
